user.title: My Weather
user.description: Combine a weather forecast entity with local sensors. Local sensor values override the base weather data when available.

data_description.name: Display name for the combined weather entity.
data_description.base_weather: The weather integration to use as the base source for condition, forecast, and fallback values (e.g. weather.home).
data_description.temperature_sensor: A sensor providing the current temperature in °C. Overrides the base weather temperature when available.
data_description.apparent_temperature_sensor: A sensor providing the feels-like / apparent temperature in °C. Overrides the base weather apparent temperature.
data_description.dew_point_sensor: A sensor providing the dew point temperature in °C. Overrides the base weather dew point.
data_description.pressure_sensor: A sensor providing atmospheric pressure in hPa. Overrides the base weather pressure when available.
data_description.humidity_sensor: A sensor providing relative humidity in %. Overrides the base weather humidity when available.
data_description.wind_speed_sensor: A sensor providing wind speed in km/h. Overrides the base weather wind speed when available.
data_description.wind_bearing_sensor: A sensor providing wind direction in degrees (0–360). Overrides the base weather wind bearing when available.
data_description.visibility_sensor: A sensor providing visibility distance in km. Overrides the base weather visibility.
data_description.cloud_coverage_sensor: A sensor providing cloud coverage in %. Overrides the base weather cloud coverage.
data_description.uv_index_sensor: A sensor providing the UV index. Overrides the base weather UV index.
data_description.ozone_sensor: A sensor providing ozone level in Dobson Units (DU). Overrides the base weather ozone.
data_description.rain_sensor: A binary sensor (on/off) or numeric sensor (rain rate in mm/h). When active or > 0, the weather condition is set to 'rainy'.

init.title: Configure sensors
init.description: Select which local sensors to use. Leave empty to use the base weather value.
